title: Commercial office, Type V-B, building height over the Table 504.3 limit
notes: First case to exercise COM-HEIGHT-ALLOWABLE at all (the rule was absent from the baseline). Type V-B NS height limit is 40 ft (Table 504.3); 55 ft NON-sprinklered exceeds it and stays under the 75 ft high-rise threshold, isolating the height check. requires_citation=False (table-store provenance), so the fail survives the citation gate.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 55 ft
Per-story area: 5,000 sf
Non-sprinklered
Design occupant load: 50
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical: 200 A main breaker
EXIT 1 (north). EXIT 2 (south).
WC 4 LAV 4.

ground_truth.rationale: 55 ft exceeds the 40 ft NS limit for Type V-B (Table 504.3); non-sprinklered, so no 504.2 +20 ft increase applies.
55 ft is below the 75 ft high-rise threshold
5,000 sf per story within the 9,000 sf NS allowable for B/V-B
2 stories within the B/V-B 2-story NS limit
